criteria_checks.comment: Scout prompt explicitly instructs to detect technologies by file extensions and config files. No hardcoded language/framework logic in extension code.

criteria_checks.criterion: INV-3: Legacy/Greenfield parity — handles all project states
criteria_checks.comment: onboardProject pre-check classifies projects into 5 states: clean, partial, foreign_system, mixed_system, compatible. Wizard offers onboarding pipeline for non-clean states.
All artifacts stored in task directory. Registry updated. Closed task artifacts readable by agents.

criteria_checks.criterion: INV-6: Deterministic context — no implicit state
criteria_checks.comment: Subagents spawned with --no-context-files. Context assembled from explicit file paths passed in task instructions.
All onboarding code lives under .pi/extensions/loom/. No standalone process spawning.

criteria_checks.criterion: INV-12: Localization — Russian UI, English system docs
criteria_checks.comment: Operator commands and notifications in Russian. System prompts (scout.md, researcher.md, migrator.md) and code comments in English. AGENTS.md passed localization guard.
scout.md prompt defined. loom_run_scout tool spawns subagent and persists stack.json to knowledge/project/onboarding/stack.json.
researcher.md prompt defined. loom_run_researcher tool spawns subagent and persists context-research.json.
migrator.md prompt defined. loom_run_migrator tool spawns subagent and persists migration-analysis.json.
Commands /rule-add, /rule-list. Tools loom_add_rule, loom_list_rules. Storage in knowledge/project/rules/. ID sanitized to prevent path traversal.
Commands /arch-add, /arch-list. Tools loom_add_architecture_component, loom_list_architecture_components. Storage in knowledge/project/architecture/components/. ID sanitized.
/loom-init expanded with pre-check, classification, and wizard. AGENTS.md generator tool (loom_generate_agents_md) implemented.
Extracted runOnboardingSubagent helper to eliminate ~90 lines of duplicated JSON parsing and persistence logic across scout/researcher/migrator tools.
Fixed isError logic: now !parsed || result.exitCode !== 0. Previously exitCode=0 with null parsed was incorrectly treated as success.
loom_add_rule and loom_add_architecture_component now sanitize IDs via /[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g -> '_' before using in file paths.

general_comments: DU-3 implementation is complete and all 6 plan steps are satisfied.
Review found and fixed 4 issues: DRY violation (3 duplicated subagent blocks), isError logic bug, unused imports, and path traversal risk in catalog IDs.
Auto-extraction of rules from code (mentioned in plan step 4) is not implemented — only manual add via tool/command. This is acceptable for MVP; auto-extraction can be added in DU-4 (Polish).
Auto-detection of architecture components (mentioned in plan step 5) is not implemented — only manual add. Acceptable for MVP.
All new schemas have corresponding TypeBox definitions and runtime validators.
Review artifact conforms to review.schema.json (validated programmatically).
